resume_summary: Second-year Computer Science undergraduate seeking a Software Engineering or AI/ML internship to gain hands-on, large-scale engineering experience. Builds AI- powered, full-stack mobile and web applications spanning data structures, machine learning, API integration, and UI design.

ats_analysis.title: Professional Summary Quality
ats_analysis.desc: The professional summary is brief but sets clear technical contexts.

ats_analysis.title: Keywords & Keyword Density
ats_analysis.desc: Matched 1 key skills. Remaining gap keywords are: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Next.js, Jest, CI/CD, Redux, Webpack.

ats_analysis.title: Grammar, Punctuation & Typos
ats_analysis.desc: No major spelling or grammar errors detected. Sentences are polished.

ats_analysis.title: Layout Flow & Structure
ats_analysis.desc: Standard chronological sections are mapped cleanly. Margins and layouts are ATS parsable.

ats_analysis.title: Active Verbs & Impact
ats_analysis.desc: Found active verbs (Collaborated, Engineered) but passive phrasings (helped, worked) still exist.

ats_analysis.title: Overall Resume Assessment
ats_analysis.desc: Good base structure. Bridge DevOps and testing gaps to improve score.

strengths: Solid alignment in key capabilities: Git.
Chronological structure matches parsing templates accurately.
weaknesses: Primary gaps in target capabilities: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
Lack of metrics and quantifiable results in work experience bullet points.

project_recommendations.title: React Component Testing Harness
project_recommendations.description: Configure Jest and React Testing Library inside a Next.js framework. Build mocks for REST hooks, test custom context state changes, and reach 90% code coverage metrics.

resume_impact.value_description: Recruiters value this project because it shows automated testing experience for large frontends, ensuring software delivery safety.

project_recommendations.learning_outcome: After completing this project you will understand Jest configuration, React Testing Library rendering, mock server routing, and code coverage auditing.

project_recommendations.title: Next.js & Tailwind CSS Responsive Dashboard
project_recommendations.description: Build a highly responsive, pixel-perfect dashboard using Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Implement dynamic charting, dark mode toggle, and optimized mobile-first grid layout.

resume_impact.value_description: Recruiters value this project because it showcases modern styling conventions, responsive layouts, and standard dashboard interaction models.

project_recommendations.learning_outcome: After completing this project you will understand utility-first styling, grid layouts, responsive breakpoints, and charting integrations.

project_recommendations.title: Multi-Stage Docker React Build
project_recommendations.description: Containerize a React/Next.js application using Docker. Configure a multi-stage Dockerfile containing a lightweight Alpine Node environment and an Nginx production server.

resume_impact.value_description: Recruiters value this project because it establishes core containerization and deployment pipelines for modern Single Page Applications (SPA).

project_recommendations.learning_outcome: After completing this project you will understand Docker networking, container orchestration, image creation, Docker Compose, and production deployment.

project_recommendations.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline Setup
project_recommendations.description: Establish a complete Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment flow. Automate linting, unit testing compliance checks, and Docker container compilation on repository commits.

resume_impact.value_description: Recruiters value this project because it demonstrates automation of verification and delivery flows, reducing release cycle times.

project_recommendations.learning_outcome: After completing this project you will understand GitHub Actions YAML syntax, secrets configuration, continuous integration, and automated Docker repository deployments.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Helped the team build the React frontend and style the website.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Collaborated on next-gen React architecture, reducing render latencies by 30% using Tailwind CSS & code-splitting.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: Quantifies achievements and incorporates active verbs instead of passive phrasing.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Worked on Python script optimization and handled docker container deployment.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Engineered multi-stage Docker build automation, reducing container sizes by 45% and speeding up CI/CD pipeline builds.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: Includes specific technical metrics and highlights Docker keyword density.
